# ABC Transportation

> ABC Transportation is a transportation service website built with a headless WordPress CMS and an Astro/React frontend.

## Website

- Homepage: https://your-production-domain.com/

## About this site

This site presents transportation service information including driver clearances, real-time GPS tracking, vehicle maintenance, wheelchair-accessible vehicles, easy booking, customer support, certified drivers, and service accountability.

## Key sections

- Experience
- We Care
- Safety

## Calls to action

- Get a Quote
- Book Online

## Technical implementation

- Frontend: Astro, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- CMS: Headless WordPress
- Custom content editing: Advanced Custom Fields Pro
- Data API: WPGraphQL and WPGraphQL for ACF
- Deployment: Vercel

## Content editing

Text, icons, images, category tabs, subcategory content, and CTA links are editable from WordPress through ACF fields.
